subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Ocean and attained unto the lights of the Countenance when the Dawning-Place of utterance came with sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن توجه الی البحر و فاز بانوار الوجه اذ اتی مشرق البیان بسلطان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation
